commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=100c20950977e0912a8af6f0aa6fdb592626eb6b)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes SDK retry-cap handling so `Retry-After` values equal to the configured max wait bypass SDK-internal retry sleeps and adds a regression test for the 60-second boundary.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection, but not from a live run: current main leaves `Retry-After: 60` retryable at the default 60-second cap, and upstream SDKs then sleep the retry-after value unless `x-should-retry: false` is injected.
commands.review_followup: The PR needs contributor-provided real behavior proof and a maintainer policy/docs alignment decision; ClawSweeper should not queue a repair while the proof gate is unmet.

target.title: fix(agents): bypass retry-after at retry cap
target.body:
## Summary
- Treat `Retry-After` values equal to `OPENCLAW_SDK_RETRY_MAX_WAIT_SECONDS` as too long for SDK-internal retry sleeps.
- Add a regression test for the OpenRouter-style `Retry-After: 60` boundary so OpenClaw surfaces the 429 immediately for fallback handling.

Fixes #83651

## Audit
- Audit A (existing helper): reused the existing retry-cap path in `provider-transport-fetch.ts`; no new classifier/helper added.
- Audit B (shared callers): `buildGuardedModelFetch` contract preserved; only the retry-cap boundary changes from `>` to `>=`.
- Audit C (broader rival): no exact #83651 PR found; broad model-fallback PRs do not overlap `src/agents/provider-transport-fetch.ts`.

## Validation
- `pnpm test -- src/agents/provider-transport-fetch.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=8192 npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | rg 'src/agents/provider-transport-fetch' || true`
- `pnpm --config.verify-deps-before-run=false check:changed`
target.author: hclsys

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
